narrative:
Precinct East Chester (precinct in Meigs County) has 860 registered voters, with 48.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.6 percentage points.
